name: Snickerdoodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cream the Butter Flavor Crisco and 1 3/4 cups sugar in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until well combined. Add eggs and vanilla, stirring until incorporated.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt. Stir this mixture into the Cribasco-sugar-egg mixture until just combined.
4. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls. In a small bowl, mix together the remaining 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon.
5. Roll each ball of dough in the cinnamon-sugar mixture, then place on ungreased baking sheets about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake at 400°F for 7-8 minutes until lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire racks.
Makes 6 dozen cookies.
